creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 255563
Patch for srt

* Remove testing, it's broken so it makes no sense to have it enabled
* Adjust Makefile to be more consistent with the rest of the tree

Compile tested on FreeBSD 13.2-RELEASE (amd64) (make, make check-plist)

Poudriere testport OK 13.4-RELEASE (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 14.1-RELEASE (amd64)

Tested with following users in Poudriere (14.1-RELEASE, amd64):
multimedia/obs-studio
www/gstreamer1-plugins-srt
